mapper.sql:
WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.type_code = #{typeCode}
AND (d.label LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.type_code AS typeCode, d.label, d.value, d.sort, d.css_class AS cssClass, d.default_flag AS defaultFlag, d.status, d.remark FROM sys_dict_data d
ORDER BY d.sort, d.id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.id, d.type_code AS typeCode, d.label, d.value, d.sort, d.css_class AS cssClass, d.default_flag AS defaultFlag, d.status, d.remark FROM sys_dict_data d WHERE d.id = #{dataId} AND d.deleted = 0

SELECT d.label, d.value, d.default_flag AS defaultFlag, d.css_class AS cssClass FROM sys_dict_data d INNER JOIN sys_dict_type t ON t.code = d.type_code AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.status = 1 WHERE d.type_code = #{typeCode} AND d.deleted = 0 AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.sort, d.id
